single.title: Cannot run scheduled scans with an expired license

search.query: `sandfly_search_audit` audit_log.message="Cannot run scheduled scans with an expired license." | stats count

single.title: Cannot run scheduled scans without a license

search.query: `sandfly_search_audit` audit_log.message="Cannot run scheduled scans without a license." | stats count

single.title: The number of configured email alerts exceeds the license limitation

search.query: `sandfly_search_audit` audit_log.message="The number of configured email alerts exceeds the license limitation;*" | stats count

single.title: The number of configured syslog alerts exceeds the license limitation

search.query: `sandfly_search_audit` audit_log.message="The number of configured syslog alerts exceeds the license limitation;*" | stats count

table.title: Most Recent Instance of License Error

search.query: `sandfly_search_audit` audit_log.message="*license*" | search NOT audit_log.message="retrieved license" | search NOT audit_log.message="deleted license key" | search NOT audit_log.message="added license key*" | eval TimeStamp=strftime(_time,"%x %r") | dedup audit_log.message | sort - _time | table TimeStamp audit_log.message | rename audit_log.message as Message
